children.name: Welcome
children.text:
UwU

Make folders and notes with the buttons up top (folders can hold folders yay) (folders can hold folders). Type in this box (can edit this text or delete this note), select text and hit B / I / U / A / ■ to format it.

Also I'm not putting this in the info tab I'm too lazy just ask me if you need help :3Btw you can't bold and italicize at the same time.

Everything autosaves to theenar_docs.json.
